rule_hits.summary: This study explores the use of AI in NMR processing, demonstrating its ability to solve previously unsolvable problems like quadrature detection using only Echo or Anti-Echo mod...
The paper cites various references related to NMR spectroscopy, deep learning applications in NMR, and specific studies on NMR data processing and analysis techniques.
The work was supported by the Swedish Research Council and used resources from the NMRbox, a Biomedical Technology Research Resource supported by NIH grant P41GM111135.
The paper titled 'BEYOND TRADITIONAL MAGNETIC RESONANCE PROCESSING WITH ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE' is authored by Amir Jahangiri and Vladislav Orekhov from the Swedish NMR Centre,...
